SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Class ReliefDisposalResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.ReliefDisposalResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class ReliefDisposalResult extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable result of a ReliefDisposalNetwork aggregation.

Reports the total simultaneous relief load that the shared flare or vent header must handle (the sum of all concurrent contributions per API STD 521 section 5.3), the peak single non-concurrent contribution, and the governing contributor.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • ReliefDisposalResult

      public ReliefDisposalResult(String networkName, double totalSimultaneousKgPerS, double peakSingleKgPerS, String governingContributor, List<ReliefLoadContribution> contributions, List<String> warnings)
      Creates an immutable relief disposal result.
      Parameters:
      networkName - the network name; not null
      totalSimultaneousKgPerS - the summed concurrent relief load [kg/s]
      peakSingleKgPerS - the largest single contribution [kg/s]
      governingContributor - the name of the largest single contributor; may be null when no contributions exist
      contributions - the contributions; not null
      warnings - any warnings raised during aggregation; not null

  • Method Details

    • getNetworkName

      public String getNetworkName()
      Gets the network name.
      Returns:
      the network name

      public double getTotalSimultaneousKgPerS()
      Gets the summed concurrent relief load that the disposal header must handle.
      Returns:
      the total simultaneous relief load [kg/s]

    • getTotalSimultaneousKgPerHr

      public double getTotalSimultaneousKgPerHr()
      Gets the summed concurrent relief load in kg/hr.
      Returns:
      the total simultaneous relief load [kg/hr]

    • getPeakSingleKgPerS

      public double getPeakSingleKgPerS()
      Gets the largest single relief contribution.
      Returns:
      the peak single contribution [kg/s]

    • getGoverningContributor

      public String getGoverningContributor()
      Gets the name of the largest single contributor.
      Returns:
      the governing contributor name, or null when there are no contributions

    • getContributions

      public List<ReliefLoadContribution> getContributions()
      Gets the list of contributions.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of contributions

      public List<String> getWarnings()
      Gets the warnings raised during aggregation.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of warnings

      Serializes this relief disposal roll-up to a human-readable JSON string.
